## Summary

A short, one-sentence description of the feature.

## Motivation

What problem does this solve? Describe the use case or limitation you're running into.

## Proposed API

If applicable, show what the ideal API would look like:

```swift
// Example usage of the proposed feature
```

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about, and why you prefer your proposal.

## Additional Context

Any related issues, links to the Flutter/Dart Bloc library counterpart, or other context.
